title: Export to excel w/ $ and %
excerpt: I want the ability to export my boards that have metrics in $ and % that will convert when exported.

posts.author: jennabeaudry (Jenna Beaudry)
posts.cookedHtml: I want the ability to export my boards that have metrics in $ and % that will convert when exported.

posts.author: tfrancis (Tanja Francis)
posts.cookedHtml: This has been a serious issue for us as well. We have a lot of those and I have to format them in excel every single time I export a board. Definitely voting for this one
